---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new Codex skill or a major skill extension
title: "[Skill]: "
labels: skill-proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Skill Name

`example-skill-name`

## Use Case

What workflow should this skill improve?

## Target Audience

Who would use it?

## Example Prompts

```text
Use the example-skill-name skill.
...
```

## Validation Strategy

How should reviewers know the skill works?

## Safety Considerations

What sensitive data, external tools, permissions, or risky actions are involved?

## Required Files

- `SKILL.md`
- `references/`
- `templates/`
- `scripts/`
- `assets/`

## Related Skills Or Prior Art

Link to public references only. Do not copy external code or private content.
